summary: Implemented depth-occluded wireframe rendering (US-070). Created occluder shaders (frag + instanced vert), an occluder utility module with material factory, InstancedMesh creation, and uniform sync. Extended cubeGrowth generator to export instanceOffsets/instanceScales/normScale and cubeLattice generator to export cellOffsets/cellScale. Added enableOcclusion config to all three wireframe systems (wireframePolyhedra, fractalGrowthWireframe, cubeLatticeWireframe) with proper occluder mesh creation, depthTest on edge/vertex materials, renderOrder management, uniform syncing in draw(), and disposal in cleanup(). Wired enableOcclusion through quality tiers (off for low, on for medium/high). Registered occluder shader attributes in shaderRegistry. Exported createBaseGeometry from polyhedraEdges. All 76 US-070 tests pass, full suite of 1804 tests pass, build succeeds.
